additional_rules.description: GMCC Diamond Jumbo AUS — Jumbo program underwritten based on DU/LP AUS with overlays. Up to $10M loan amount. 1-unit primary up to 89.99% LTV (740+ FICO, ≤$5M). No MI required. No P&L/Balance Sheet for self-employed. 100% gift funds allowed for down payment on primary/second home. Co-op eligible in NY only.
additional_rules.ltv_tiers: 1-unit primary: 89.99% (740 FICO), 85% (700), 80% (680) up to $5M; 65% for $5M-$10M. 2-unit: 80% up to $5M. 3-4 unit: 75% up to $5M. Second home: 85% (740), 80% (680) up to $5M. Investment: 80% 1-unit up to $2.5M, 75% 2-4 unit.
additional_rules.dti_details: 43% max DTI for LTV ≤85%; 35% max DTI for LTV >85%-89.99%.
additional_rules.reserves_details: 6-30 months depending on LTV and FICO tier. 30% of loan amount for loans >$5M. 12 months if reserves include retirement assets.
additional_rules.see_guidelines: Refer to GMCC Diamond Jumbo AUS training materials for full LTV/FICO matrices and reserve schedules.

general_notes: GMCC Diamond Jumbo AUS — Jumbo Express program underwritten based on DU/LP AUS with overlays.
Available in all 49 GMCC-licensed states (excludes Alaska).
Loan amounts from $10,000 to $10,000,000. Min FICO 680. Max DTI 43% (35% if LTV >85%).
1-unit primary: up to 89.99% LTV with 740+ FICO (≤$5M). No MI required above 80% LTV.
Purchase, rate/term refi, and cash-out refi. Primary, investment, and second home eligible.
100% gift funds for down payment on primary and second home (min 5% borrower's own funds if LTV >80%).
No P&L or balance sheet required for self-employed borrowers. Rent free allowed.
Max 10 financed properties for second home and investment. Co-op eligible in NY only.
Temporary buydown OK (3/2/1, 2/1, 1/0). Texas 50(a)(6) and 50(f)(2) OK up to 80% LTV.
